auth.creatorAccessRequired: Creator access is required to use Forge

worlds.subtitle: Manage your worlds and drafts
worlds.noWorlds: No published worlds yet. Create your first world to get started.

agents.subtitle: Manage your AI agents
agents.noAgents: No agents yet. Create your first agent to get started.
agents.conceptPlaceholder: A brief description of this agent's personality and purpose...

agentDetail.scenarioPlaceholder: The scenario or setting for this agent...
agentDetail.greetingPlaceholder: The first message the agent sends...
agentDetail.primaryTypeHint: Select the core personality archetype for this agent.
agentDetail.secondaryTraitsHint: Choose up to 3 traits that flavor the personality.
agentDetail.behavioralRulesHint: Define boundaries, trigger responses, and forbidden topics. One rule per line.
agentDetail.rulesPlaceholder:
e.g. Never break character
Do not discuss real-world politics
Always respond in character voice
agentDetail.soulPrimeHint: The core system prompt that defines this agent's identity and behavior.
agentDetail.soulPrimePlaceholder: Enter the agent's soul prime / system prompt...
agentDetail.previewNotice: Live preview requires runtime AI client integration. This will be available in a future update.
agentDetail.apiKeysHint: Manage API keys for programmatic access to your agents.
agentDetail.confirmRevoke: Revoke this key? This cannot be undone.

imageStudio.subtitle: Generate AI images for your worlds and agents
imageStudio.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate...
imageStudio.runtimeNotice: Image generation requires runtime AI client integration. Available in a future update.

videoStudio.subtitle: Upload and manage video content
videoStudio.dropzone: Drag and drop video files here, or click to browse
videoStudio.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format. Use MP4, MOV, or WebM.

musicStudio.subtitle: Generate AI music for your worlds and characters
musicStudio.title: Title
musicStudio.promptPlaceholder: Describe the mood and feel of the music...
musicStudio.runtimeNotice: Music generation requires runtime AI client integration. Available in a future update.

contentLibrary.subtitle: Browse and manage all your media assets
contentLibrary.noAssets: No content yet. Create images, videos, or music to build your library.

releases.subtitle: Draft posts, choose a publish identity, and review publish history
releases.backendNoticeDetail: This screen will be implemented as a Forge app workflow on top of existing post capabilities. It no longer depends on a separate publishing backend module.
releases.noReleases: No publish drafts yet. Create a draft to prepare a post and publish it as yourself or a selected agent.
releases.releaseHint: Drafts stay in Forge app state. Published history will be derived from existing post and feed queries.
releases.editorHint: Current publish path supports creator-authored posts with image/video assets.
releases.selectDraft: Create or select a draft to start publishing.
releases.title: Title
releases.caption: Caption
releases.captionPlaceholder: Write the text that will accompany the post
releases.agentPublishNotice: Agent identity is selectable now, but publishing through the Forge realm client is not wired yet. Save the draft and switch back to Creator to publish today.

channels.subtitle: Choose where a post appears and which identity publishes it
channels.backendNotice: Publish Identity Workflow Not Wired Yet
channels.backendNoticeDetail: Internal destinations are Forge UI semantics over existing post primitives. No separate publishing backend module is required for them.
channels.defaultIdentityHint: Choose the identity Forge preselects for new publish drafts.
channels.agentIdentityHint: Agent identity can be preselected now, but live agent publishing is still pending Forge-side wiring.

revenue.subtitle: Track your earnings and manage payouts
revenue.connectNotConnected: Set up payouts to withdraw your earnings
revenue.noData: No earnings data for this period

withdrawals.connectRequired: Stripe Connect must be set up before you can withdraw.

copyright.subtitle: Register, license, and protect your creative works
copyright.backendNoticeDetail: Copyright is not part of the current Forge delivery scope. This page remains a placeholder until a smaller extension is explicitly approved.
copyright.registrationsHint: Register your original content with verifiable timestamps and content hashes.
copyright.licensesHint: Assign usage licenses to your registered works.
copyright.noLicenses: No licenses configured yet. Register content first.
copyright.attributionsHint: Track attribution chains between original and derivative works.
copyright.infringementsHint: Report and track content infringement cases.

templates.subtitle: Discover and fork world templates from other creators
templates.backendNoticeDetail: Template workflows are deferred until they are redesigned against world-studio and world draft semantics.
templates.noTemplates: Template marketplace is deferred in the current Forge scope.
templates.noMyTemplates: You haven't published any templates yet.

advisors.subtitle: AI-powered analysis and recommendations for your content
advisors.runtimeNotice: AI advisors require runtime text.stream integration. Available in a future update.
advisors.worldAdvisorDesc: Analyze world consistency, timeline, and narrative structure
advisors.agentCoachDesc: Optimize agent personality traits and engagement
advisors.emptyChat: Start by asking a question or generating a report.

analytics.subtitle: Data-driven insights into your content performance
analytics.backendNoticeDetail: Analytics is out of the current Forge scope. This page remains a placeholder until a separate analytics module is approved.
analytics.noData: Analytics is deferred in the current Forge scope.
analytics.retentionDesc: User return rates by weekly cohort.
analytics.heatmapDesc: Content interaction intensity across events, agents, and lorebooks.

settings.subtitle: Configure your Forge experience
settings.enableNotificationsDesc: Show desktop notifications for important events
